privacy.section_1_p1: Daily Deal Finder does not require user registration and does not collect personal information through forms on this website. We do not store, collect, or process personal data unless voluntarily provided through email contact.
privacy.section_1_p2: When you contact us via email, we receive your email address and any information you include in your message. This information is used solely to respond to your inquiry and is never shared, sold, or used for marketing purposes.
privacy.section_2_p1: Daily Deal Finder does not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or any cookie-based tracking technology. We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or similar third-party tracking services.
privacy.section_3_p1: Some links on this website may be affiliate links, including Amazon Associates links. When you click on an affiliate link and make a purchase, the retailer may place a cookie in your browser to track that the referral came from Daily Deal Finder. We do not have access to or control over these third-party cookies.
privacy.section_4_p1: When you choose to connect your Pinterest Business account through Pinterest OAuth, we access only the permissions you explicitly grant. We request only the minimum permissions necessary: reading your public profile and boards, and creating Pins on your behalf when you explicitly initiate that action.
privacy.section_4_p2: We do not and cannot access your Pinterest password. We do not publish, edit, delete, or modify Pinterest content without your explicit action and authorization. We do not access private messages, passwords, payment information, or other sensitive personal data.
privacy.section_5_p1: When you authorize our application, Pinterest provides us with an access token and a refresh token. These tokens are stored securely and used solely to maintain your authorized connection. You can revoke access at any time through your Pinterest account settings. Upon revocation, all stored Pinterest tokens are permanently deleted.
privacy.section_6_p1: We may use third-party services (Pinterest API, Amazon Associates, OpenAI API) to provide our service. These services have their own privacy policies that govern their use of data.
privacy.section_7_p1: If you are in the European Economic Area, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data. You may also object to processing and have the right to data portability. Contact us at mushvig.azizov@gmail.com to exercise any of these rights.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.intro: Daily Deal Finder was created to make online shopping discovery simpler, clearer, and more helpful.
mission.goal: We want visitors to find practical product ideas without feeling lost in endless search results.
mission.transparency: Our mission is to combine useful content, transparent affiliate disclosure, and responsible publishing practices.
mission.future: As the project grows, we aim to improve our product guides, shopping categories, and visual discovery experience.

editorial.title: Editorial Policy
editorial.intro: Daily Deal Finder publishes product inspiration, buying guides, and helpful shopping recommendations for everyday users.
editorial.purpose: Our content is created to help visitors discover useful products, compare options, and make more informed shopping decisions.
editorial.affiliate: Some pages may include affiliate links. If a visitor clicks an affiliate link and makes a purchase, we may earn a commission at no additional cost.
editorial.independence: We aim to keep our recommendations useful, transparent, and clearly separated from official Pinterest or Amazon services.

about.title: About Daily Deal Finder
about.hero_intro: Smart shopping inspiration, useful product discovery, and transparent affiliate recommendations.
about.mission_body: Daily Deal Finder helps visitors discover carefully selected products, daily deals, and shopping inspiration in a clean, trustworthy format. We focus on useful product ideas, transparent affiliate disclosure, and simple content that helps people make better shopping decisions.
about.item_1: Curate practical product ideas across useful categories
about.item_4: Keep our content simple, honest, and mobile-friendly
about.affiliate_body: Some links on this website may be affiliate links, including Amazon Associates links. This means we may earn a small commission at no additional cost to you when you purchase through these links. We only recommend products we believe are genuinely useful.
about.contact_prefix: Have questions or suggestions? Reach out at

contact.title: Contact
contact.hero_intro: Have questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.response_time: We aim to respond within 24–48 hours.

affiliate.title: Affiliate Disclosure
affiliate.hero_intro: Transparent information about affiliate links and commissions.
affiliate.section_1_body: Some links on this website are affiliate links. If you click an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may receive a small commission at no additional cost to you.
affiliate.section_2_body1: Daily Deal Finder participates in the Amazon EU Associates Program, an affiliate advertising program that allows websites to earn advertising fees by linking to Amazon.de.
affiliate.section_2_body2: As an Amazon Associate, we earn from qualifying purchases. Amazon and the Amazon logo are trademarks of Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates.
affiliate.section_3_body: Product prices and availability may change at any time. Please verify the current price and availability directly on Amazon.de before making a purchase.
affiliate.section_4_body: Affiliate links are identified with the #Ad label on product cards.
affiliate.section_5_body: The price you pay remains the same whether you purchase through our affiliate link or directly from Amazon.

terms.section_1_p1: By accessing and using Daily Deal Finder, you agree to comply with these Terms of Service.
terms.section_2_p1: Daily Deal Finder is an informational shopping inspiration website. We do not sell products directly. We provide product ideas, recommendations, and links to third-party retailers including Amazon.de.
terms.section_3_p1: Some links on this website are affiliate links. We may earn a commission when you purchase through these links at no additional cost to you. Affiliate links are clearly marked with
terms.section_4_p1: Daily Deal Finder may integrate with Pinterest services. Any Pinterest integration is used only with explicit user authorization. We do not publish, edit, delete, or modify Pinterest content without user approval. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Pinterest.
terms.section_5_p1: Daily Deal Finder is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or availability of product information, prices, or links displayed on this website.
terms.section_6_p1: Daily Deal Finder and its operators shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of this website or from purchases made through third-party links.

impressum.subtitle: Information pursuant to Section 5 DDG
impressum.disclaimer_text: The content of this website is prepared with the greatest possible care. However, no guarantee can be given for the accuracy, completeness, or currentness of the information.
impressum.links_text: This website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no control. The respective provider or operator is always responsible for the content of linked pages.
impressum.copyright_text: Content and works created by the operator of this website are subject to copyright law. Reproduction, editing, or distribution requires the operator's written permission.
impressum.amazon_text: As an Amazon Associate, we earn from qualifying purchases. Amazon and the Amazon logo are trademarks of Amazon.com, Inc. or its affiliates.
